allow: Bash(python -c "import plotly.io._html as h; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(h.to_html\); print\(sig\)")

Bash(python -c "import plotly.io as pio, plotly.graph_objects as go, re; h = pio.to_html\(go.Figure\(\), include_plotlyjs='cdn', full_html=False\); m = re.search\(r'<script\\b[^>]*src=\\"[^\\"]+\\"[^>]*></script>', h\); print\(m.group\(0\) if m else 'NO MATCH'\); print\('---'\); print\(h[:300]\)")

Bash(python -c "import re; content = open\('dashboard.html', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); print\('File size:', len\(content\), 'chars'\); has_dtype = '\\"dtype\\"' in content; has_bdata = '\\"bdata\\"' in content; has_old_cdn = 'plotly-2.27.0' in content; m = re.search\(r'cdn\\.plot\\.ly/plotly-[\\d.]+', content\); print\('dtype present:', has_dtype\); print\('bdata present:', has_bdata\); print\('old CDN present:', has_old_cdn\); print\('CDN found:', m.group\(0\) if m else 'NONE'\)")

Bash(python -c "import re; h=open\('dashboard.html',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); m=re.search\(r'href=\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"[^>]*>[^<]+isys573', h\); print\('Footer URL:', m.group\(1\) if m else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
